case_title: FRANTZ, RANDALL VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO: HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FRANTZ, RANDALL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO: HOUSING AUTHORITY WILLIAMS, CHARLES JACKO, CAREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PLTF FILED DECL:C&C OFSF NOT RESPONDED AFTER 45DAY S
COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S BRIEF MAILED TO DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO: HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CHARLES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-03-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANTZ, RANDALL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO: HOUSING AUTHORITY PLTF WAIVED SUIT IN SUP CT & FED CT. WANTS SUIT TRIED UNDER CC 1941.1(F). DEFT CHARLES WILLIAMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
